prophecies.a: 「当铁鸟飞翔于天空，铁马奔跑于大地之时，藏人将如蚂蚁般流散于世界各地，佛法将传到红人的土地。」
prophecies.q_en: Iron birds fly, iron horses run
prophecies.a_en: "When the iron bird flies and horses run on wheels, the Tibetan people will be scattered across the world like ants, and the Dharma will come to the land of the red man."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪飞机（铁鸟）和汽车（铁马）普及后，1959年西藏发生重大政治变动，达赖喇嘛及大批藏人流亡印度及世界各地。此后藏传佛教确实广泛传入欧美（红人的土地一说存在多种解读）。
prophecies.verdict_en: After aircraft ('iron birds') and automobiles ('iron horses') became widespread in the 20th century, major political upheaval in Tibet in 1959 led to the Dalai Lama and many Tibetans fleeing to India and across the world. Tibetan Buddhism subsequently spread widely to Europe and America (the 'land of the red man' has multiple interpretations).

prophecies.a: 「当铁鸟飞翔之时，佛法将传到西方。」莲师预言佛法不会永远局限于东方，终将在适当的因缘下向西传播。
prophecies.q_en: Dharma will spread to the West
prophecies.a_en: "When the iron bird flies, Dharma will go to the West." Padmasambhava prophesied that Buddhism would not remain confined to the East forever, but would spread westward when conditions ripened.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪下半叶，大量藏传佛教上师赴欧美弘法。创巴仁波切1970年代在美国创立那洛巴大学和香巴拉中心；宗萨蒋扬钦哲仁波切等在西方广泛传法。如今藏传佛教中心遍布欧美各国。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the latter half of the 20th century, numerous Tibetan Buddhist masters traveled to Europe and America to teach. Chögyam Trungpa Rinpoche founded Naropa University and Shambhala centers in the US in the 1970s; Dzongsar Khyentse Rinpoche and others teach widely in the West. Today Tibetan Buddhist centers exist throughout Europe and North America.

prophecies.q: 末法时代人心堕落的景象
prophecies.a: 「到了末法时代，父亲的话语将被儿子蔑视，母亲的教导将被女儿嘲笑。朋友之间满是欺诈，亲人之间只有猜忌。人们将为微薄的利益而争斗不休，为虚假的荣耀而出卖灵魂。」
prophecies.q_en: The moral decline of the degenerate age
prophecies.a_en: "In the degenerate age, a father's words will be scorned by his son, a mother's teachings mocked by her daughter. Among friends there will be only deceit, among relatives only suspicion. People will fight endlessly over meager gains and sell their souls for false glory."

prophecies.q: 末法时代的虚伪修行者
prophecies.a: 「穿袈裟者不修行，持念珠者不念经。寺庙变成市场，佛像变成商品。自称上师者如同犬群，追逐名闻利养。」
prophecies.q_en: False practitioners in the degenerate age
prophecies.a_en: "Those who wear robes will not practice, those who hold rosaries will not recite prayers. Temples will become marketplaces, statues will become commodities. Self-proclaimed masters will be like packs of dogs, chasing fame and profit."

prophecies.a: 「雪域将被外来者占据，寺院将被摧毁，僧侣将被迫脱下袈裟。经文将被风吹散，佛塔将成为瓦砾。」
prophecies.q_en: Tibet will be invaded by outsiders
prophecies.a_en: "The Land of Snow will be occupied by outsiders, monasteries will be destroyed, monks will be forced to remove their robes. Scriptures will be scattered by the wind, stupas will become rubble."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1950年中国人民解放军进入西藏，1959年拉萨发生大规模冲突后达赖喇嘛流亡印度。文化大革命期间（1966-1976），西藏大量寺院被拆毁，僧侣被迫还俗，经文和佛像遭到破坏。
prophecies.verdict_en: The People's Liberation Army entered Tibet in 1950, and after large-scale conflict in Lhasa in 1959, the Dalai Lama fled to India. During the Cultural Revolution (1966-1976), numerous Tibetan monasteries were demolished, monks were forced to disrobe, and scriptures and statues were destroyed.

prophecies.a: 「五浊恶世之时，大地将震动不安，洪水将吞没城镇，烈火将焚烧山林。四季失序，冬天温暖如春，夏天寒冷如冬。庄稼歉收，饥荒蔓延。」
prophecies.q_en: An era of frequent natural disasters
prophecies.a_en: "In the time of the five degenerations, the earth will tremble ceaselessly, floods will swallow towns, and wildfires will burn the forests. The seasons will lose their order — winter warm as spring, summer cold as winter. Harvests will fail and famine will spread."

prophecies.a: 「人类将制造出能在瞬间毁灭千人的武器。战火将遍及大地，血流成河。各国之间不再有信任，盟约如同废纸。」
prophecies.a_en: "Humans will create weapons that can destroy thousands in an instant. War will spread across the earth, blood will flow like rivers. Trust between nations will vanish, and treaties will be like waste paper."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪人类发明了核武器，1945年广岛和长崎原子弹在瞬间造成数万人死亡。两次世界大战造成数千万人丧生。冷战期间各国核军备竞赛，国际条约屡遭违反。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 20th century, nuclear weapons were invented, and the atomic bombs dropped on Hiroshima and Nagasaki in 1945 killed tens of thousands instantly. Two World Wars claimed tens of millions of lives. During the Cold War, nations engaged in nuclear arms races and international treaties were repeatedly violated.

prophecies.q: 人类将用神奇器物远距离通话
prophecies.a: 「人们将通过小小的器物与远在天边的人交谈，如同面对面一般。消息的传递将快过飞鸟。」
prophecies.q_en: Humans will speak across distances through wondrous devices
prophecies.a_en: "People will speak to those far away through small devices, as if face to face. Messages will travel faster than birds."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1876年贝尔发明电话，20世纪末移动电话普及，21世纪智能手机让人们能够通过视频通话「如同面对面一般」。电报、电话、互联网的发展使信息传递速度远超任何物理方式。
prophecies.verdict_en: Alexander Graham Bell invented the telephone in 1876. Mobile phones became widespread by the late 20th century, and 21st-century smartphones enable video calls 'as if face to face.' The development of telegraph, telephone, and internet made information transfer far faster than any physical means.

prophecies.q: 伏藏法将在后世适时显现
prophecies.a: 「我将教法封藏于大地、湖泊、天空与心意之中。未来当众生因缘成熟之时，掘藏师将一一发掘，令佛法重新光明于世。每个时代都将有适合该时代的法门出现。」
prophecies.q_en: Hidden terma teachings will emerge at the right time
prophecies.a_en: "I conceal teachings in the earth, in lakes, in the sky, and in the mindstream. In the future, when beings' karma ripens, treasure-revealers will discover them one by one, so that the Dharma may shine anew. In each era, teachings suited to that era will appear."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 自11世纪起，西藏历史上出现了大量掘藏师（terton），包括14世纪的邬金林巴、19世纪的蒋扬钦哲旺波和秋吉林巴等。他们发掘的伏藏文献构成了藏传佛教宁玛派的重要经典体系，持续至今仍有新伏藏被发现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 11th century, numerous treasure-revealers (tertons) have appeared in Tibetan history, including Orgyen Lingpa in the 14th century, Jamyang Khyentse Wangpo and Chokgyur Lingpa in the 19th century. The terma texts they discovered form a major part of the Nyingma school's canonical literature, and new terma continue to be revealed to this day.

prophecies.a: 「末法之时，人人追逐财富如同饿鬼追逐食物。富者愈富，贫者愈贫。人们将用尽一切手段积聚财物，却永远不会满足。金钱将成为人们唯一的信仰。」
prophecies.q_en: People will go mad for wealth
prophecies.a_en: "In the degenerate age, everyone will chase wealth like hungry ghosts chasing food. The rich will grow richer, the poor poorer. People will use every means to accumulate possessions, yet never be satisfied. Money will become people's only faith."

prophecies.q: 佛法最终将从世间消失
prophecies.a: 「佛法将如同油灯耗尽灯油。先是密法失传，再是大乘衰落，最后小乘也将消亡。届时世间将陷入漫长的黑暗，直到弥勒佛降世。」
prophecies.q_en: The Dharma will eventually vanish from the world
prophecies.a_en: "The Dharma will be like a lamp running out of oil. First the Secret Mantra will be lost, then the Mahayana will decline, and finally the Hinayana too will perish. Then the world will enter a long darkness, until Maitreya Buddha comes."

prophecies.a: 「末法时代，食物将失去滋味与力量。人们吃得再多也不健壮，药物治不好疾病。新的瘟疫将频繁出现，医者束手无策。」
prophecies.a_en: "In the degenerate age, food will lose its flavor and power. No matter how much people eat, they will not be strong. Medicines will fail to cure diseases. New plagues will appear frequently, and healers will be helpless."

prophecies.q: 莲师将在末法时代再来
prophecies.a: 「当末法黑暗最深重之时，我将化身再来，重振佛法。我的化身将出现在世界各地，以不同的面貌度化众生。不要失去信心，我从未离开过你们。」
prophecies.q_en: Padmasambhava will return in the degenerate age
prophecies.a_en: "When the darkness of the degenerate age is deepest, I will manifest again to revive the Dharma. My emanations will appear across the world, in different forms, to guide beings. Do not lose faith — I have never left you."

prophecies.q: 人们将沉迷于虚幻的影像
prophecies.a: 「人们将整日注视着发光的镜子，沉迷于其中虚幻的影像，忘记了真实的世界。孩子不再奔跑于田野，而是被困在发光的牢笼之中。」
prophecies.q_en: People will be addicted to illusory images
prophecies.a_en: "People will stare all day at glowing mirrors, lost in the illusory images within, forgetting the real world. Children will no longer run in the fields, but will be trapped in glowing cages."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 电视机自20世纪中叶普及，2007年iPhone发布后智能手机迅速成为人们日常生活的核心。屏幕成瘾已成为全球性社会问题，各国研究显示青少年户外活动时间显著减少，屏幕使用时间持续增长。
prophecies.verdict_en: Television became widespread from the mid-20th century, and after the iPhone launch in 2007, smartphones rapidly became central to daily life. Screen addiction has become a global social issue, with studies worldwide showing significant decreases in youth outdoor activity and continuous growth in screen time.

prophecies.a: 「在末法时期，国与国之间将纷争不断。即使签下和平的誓言，背后也在磨刀。小国将被大国吞噬，弱者将被强者欺凌。世间将没有真正的和平。」
prophecies.a_en: "In the degenerate age, nations will quarrel without end. Even when peace oaths are signed, they sharpen their blades behind their backs. Small nations will be devoured by great ones, the weak bullied by the strong. There will be no true peace in the world."
